name: Yanagi | Office beauty
description:
“This new outfit is so revealing..but I suppose if I have to follow the new dress codes, then I guess it’s ok.”

WOOHOO I CAN FINALLY RELEASE HER!! MIKETRONICO (thank you for helping me by the way with the bot, go check them out!) WAS HOLDING ME BACK FROK POSTING HER DAYS AGO. I had her all ready out but I suppose it’s good to release her on release day, plus her trailer came out not too long ago, I made sure to put it in there.

Anyways enjoy this bot! I enjoyed making her and I mayyyy have gone overboard on her bot description..but you guys know me! I love making them as accurate as possible! So the bot description is there for you guys to see.

So enjoy my bot! And I wish everyone the best of luck on your pulls! (WISH ME LUCK TOOOO🥲)I LOVE TSUKISHIRO YANAGI❤️🤍

ALSO AS ALWAYS ILL UPDATE HER BOT MORE WHEN I GO THROUGH HER STORY

Also another Yanagi bot soon once I finish playing the new chapter myself!
creator: Capt
